lines: Asa turns one child’s slate toward you. A blue line bends around the letters and ends at a square with no name.
"Good. The line passes a safe tap and a canvas stair. The door at the end opens without asking the child to prove who sleeps behind it."

choices.label: Ask why the letters come later
Give the slate back to Asa

lines: "Letters can wait until a child knows where the lesson is taking them."
Asa stacks the slate face down before the council enters.

choices.label: Leave the lesson with its route
